protocol_title.value: Inhibiting fatty acid synthase to improve efficacy of neoadjuvant chemotherapy
protocol_title.evidence: Inhibiting fatty acid synthase to improve efficacy of neoadjuvant chemotherapy

sponsor.evidence: Support Provided By: Breast Cancer Research Foundation

indication.value: Newly diagnosed triple negative breast cancer (TNBC)
indication.evidence: Newly diagnosed triple negative breast cancer (TNBC)

primary_objective.value: Estimate the rate of pCR in TNBC patients with FASN expression treated with standard neoadjuvant chemotherapy plus high-dose omeprazole.
primary_objective.evidence: Estimate the rate of pCR in patients with triple negative breast cancer and FASN expression...

value: Quantify number of TNBC patients expressing FASN
Estimate pCR rate irrespective of FASN status
Describe safety of high-dose omeprazole with standard neoadjuvant chemotherapy
Estimate biologic activity of omeprazole in modulating FASN expression and activity
Compare peak omeprazole concentration to preclinical IC50
Use PK-PD models to predict clinical outcome
Explore changes in lipid profile over time

primary_endpoint.value: Pathologic complete response (pCR): no invasive disease in breast or axilla at surgery.
primary_endpoint.evidence: pCR is defined as no invasive disease in the breast or axilla

value: Change in FASN expression and activity

omeprazole.schedule: Start 4–7 days before chemotherapy; continue until night before surgery
omeprazole.evidence: Omeprazole 80 mg orally BID beginning 4-7 days prior to chemotherapy

ac_regimen.evidence: doxorubicin (60 mg/m2) and cyclophosphamide (600 mg/m2) for 4 cycles

inclusion_criteria: Newly diagnosed TNBC stage I (T1c), II, or III
Adequate organ function (LVEF, Hgb, ANC, platelets, creatinine, bilirubin, AST)
exclusion_criteria: Use of Orlistat or other FASN inhibitors

schedule_of_assessments.value: Full schedule provided including baseline, omeprazole-only period, AC cycles, paclitaxel weeks, and pre-surgery assessments

biopsy_requirements: Biopsy at surgery if residual disease

toxicity_grading.evidence: graded according to the Common Terminology Criteria for Adverse Events (version 4.0)

dose_modifications.value: Detailed AC and paclitaxel/carboplatin dose modification rules provided

human_review_required.reason: Protocol does not explicitly state open-label vs blinded
TNBC is clear, but whether metastatic vs early-stage is inferred from neoadjuvant context

regulatory_risk_flags: Human validation required before use in regulated decision-making
Protocol is single-arm; confirm comparator or standard-of-care assumptions
Confirm additional approvals required for biopsy or imaging procedures
Check AE reporting timelines and monitoring plan in full protocol

audit_trail.extraction_method: LLM structured extraction using prompt template (see prompt.md)
audit_trail.validation: Human review required for flagged fields
audit_trail.data_handling_note: No patient-level data used; any personal contact information removed
